prompt: I have a Next.js app with a features section that has 6 cards in a grid. I want them to fade in and slide up one by one as the user scrolls down to them. Use motion.

assertions.text: Uses whileInView or viewport-triggered animation (not manual scroll listeners)
Implements staggered animation using staggerChildren or animation-delay
Includes 'use client' directive for Next.js compatibility
Renders 6 cards in a CSS grid layout
